description: Curator verdicts for catalog entry descriptions. RTL-P2.399. Scanner honours verdict=good entries by emitting locked_text verbatim, skipping every tier. See routertl/docs/internal/ or RTL-P2.399 backlog for the full design.

analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.locked_text: Time-division duplex controller generating synchronized transmit and receive path switching signals based on frame timing.
analog-devices/ad_tdd_control.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.locked_text: Cross-domain reset and enable manager for AXI DMA controller request, destination, and source clock domains.
analog-devices/axi_dmac_reset_manager.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.locked_text: Register bank for the HSCI master controller, exposing configuration and status fields over the processor interface.
analog-devices/hsci_master_regs_regs.notes: upstream description was an ASCII register-map dump; rewrote from module role.

analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.locked_text: High-speed serial link controller coordinating FSM-based link establishment with clock adjustment and alignment.
analog-devices/hsci_mlink_ctrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.locked_text: Configurable delay controller with register-based processor interface for multiple delay channels and DRP readback.
analog-devices/up_delay_cntrl.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during P2.396 rescan.

opencores/eth_maccontrol.locked_text: Implements IEEE 802.3x flow control by detecting incoming PAUSE frames and inhibiting transmission for the requested duration.
opencores/eth_maccontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_miim.locked_text: MII Management interface controller driving MDC and MDIO for PHY register read and write transactions.
opencores/eth_miim.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_outputcontrol.locked_text: Coordinates output control signals between the MAC transmit pipeline and the GMII/MII PHY interface, gating transmissions on link state.
opencores/eth_outputcontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_receivecontrol.locked_text: Manages receive-side flow control by signalling pause requests upstream when the RX FIFO threshold is crossed.
opencores/eth_receivecontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_rxstatem.locked_text: Receive-path state machine coordinating preamble detection, frame data capture, and end-of-frame signalling.
opencores/eth_rxstatem.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_shiftreg.locked_text: Parameterized shift register used to serialise and deserialise data within the MAC pipeline.
opencores/eth_shiftreg.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_transmitcontrol.locked_text: Manages transmit-side coordination including collision detection responses, deferral, and retransmit triggering.
opencores/eth_transmitcontrol.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/eth_txstatem.locked_text: Transmit-path state machine sequencing preamble emission, frame data, and inter-packet gap timing.
opencores/eth_txstatem.notes: hand-written after LLM fell through to auto-filler during RTL-P4.24 / P3.305 ethmac + ethernet_tri_mode rescan; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on these state-machine and control-block modules.

opencores/MAC_tx_addr_add.locked_text: Inserts the configured source MAC address into outgoing transmit frames before the FCS calculation pipeline.

opencores/usbHostControl.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest; LLM output kept tripping the R10-R14 validator on USB top-level controllers and PCI critical-path bus-signal drivers.

opencores/usbSlaveControl.locked_text: USB device-side control logic handling SETUP token responses, endpoint state, and host control transfer phases.

opencores/USBSlaveControlBI.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest follow-up; LLM tripping R10-R14 validator on these final 5.

opencores/USBHostControlBI.locked_text: Backend interface module bridging the USB host controller to the user-facing FIFO and register interface.
opencores/USBHostControlBI.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/lineControlUpdate.locked_text: Updates USB line control state including bus speed sensing and D+/D- pull-up enable signalling.
opencores/lineControlUpdate.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/pci_mas_ch_state_crit.locked_text: Critical-path PCI master channel state register tracking ongoing transaction phase for downstream bus-signal generation.
opencores/pci_mas_ch_state_crit.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/pci_master32_sm.locked_text: Top-level 32-bit PCI master state machine sequencing address phase, data phases, and turn-around for outgoing transactions.
opencores/pci_master32_sm.notes: hand-written during RTL-P3.321/322/323 batch ingest second follow-up.

opencores/Clk_ctrl.locked_text: Generates and distributes multiple clock signals at different frequencies for the MAC and PHY subsystems.
opencores/Clk_ctrl.notes: hand-written; LLM produced this on prior runs but tripped validator on this one — model variance, locking to prevent flapping.

opencores/pci_target32_sm.locked_text: Top-level 32-bit PCI target state machine sequencing address decode, latency timeouts, and data-phase progress for slave-side transactions.
opencores/pci_target32_sm.notes: hand-written; companion to pci_master32_sm. LLM tripping validator on this state-machine top.

opencores/writeUSBWireData.locked_text: Drives the USB D+/D- wire signals at NRZI bit timing during outgoing packet transmission from the serial interface engine.
opencores/writeUSBWireData.notes: hand-written; final straggler in RTL-P3.321/322/323/324 batch ingest.

opencores/amber.locked_text: ARMv2-compatible 32-bit RISC processor with Wishbone bus (Conor Santifort 2010+). Two pipeline variants: a23 (3-stage) and a25 (5-stage), shared register file, MMU, caches.
opencores/amber.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/copyblaze.locked_text: PicoBlaze-compatible 8-bit microcontroller in VHDL-2008 (Adrien Trousson 2015+). Compact softcore with peripheral ecosystem (UART, GPIO) over Wishbone.
opencores/copyblaze.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/ethernet_tri_mode.locked_text: Tri-mode 10/100/1000 Mbps Ethernet MAC with GMII PHY interface (Jon Gao, OpenCores 2005-2018). 32-bit OpenCores streaming user bus, Wishbone-style CSR access, includes RMON statistics.
opencores/ethernet_tri_mode.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary. Metadata-sweep correction 2026-05-04: dates re-anchored to opencores.org/projects/<slug> canonical.

opencores/usbhostslave.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

opencores/xge_mac.locked_text: 10 Gigabit Ethernet MAC with XGMII PHY interface and Wishbone bus (A. Tanguay 2008). Packet-level pkt_tx/pkt_rx user interface, includes generic FIFOs and clock-domain-crossing utilities.
opencores/xge_mac.notes: top-level repo description for granularity=repo entry. Scanner picked arbitrary internal modules as the description source; this locks the user-facing text to a meaningful project summary.

alex-forencich/verilog-ethernet.locked_text: Verilog Ethernet MAC + IP/UDP stack supporting 1G/10G/25G/40G/100G with both Intel and Xilinx primitives (Alex Forencich). Deprecated upstream — author moved active development to fpganinja/taxi (CERN-OHL-S-2.0); MIT-licensed verilog-ethernet remains freely available here.

opencores/tiny_aes.locked_text: AES (Advanced Encryption Standard) symmetric block cipher with 128/192/256-bit key support and configurable round-pipeline (Homer Hsing 2012+). Includes both encryption and decryption cores. Ships a FuseSoC manifest.
opencores/tiny_aes.notes: top-level repo description for P3.325 granularity=repo entry. RTL-P4.32 workaround.

opencores/1000base-x.locked_text: 1000BASE-X physical coding sublayer (PCS) implementing IEEE 802.3 8b/10b encoding and synchronization for SFP-attached 1G optical transceivers.

opencores/minsoc.locked_text: Minimal OpenRISC 1200 system-on-chip — OR1200 CPU with Wishbone-attached on-chip RAM, UART, Ethernet, and JTAG debug. Generic FPGA targets (Xilinx + Altera). Authors: Xanthopoulos, Hicks, Almansa, Yawn, Jayar, Fajardo (2009-2013).

opencores/sparc64soc.locked_text: Full SoC built around OpenSPARC T1 with floating-point unit, OS2WB Wishbone bridge, and OpenCores peripherals (NOR flash, UART, Ethernet, DRAM controllers). Capable of running Ubuntu Linux 2.6.22+. Authors: Rozhdestvenskiy, Fazzino (2010-2011).
opencores/sparc64soc.notes: top-level repo description for P3.351 granularity=repo entry. RTL-P4.32 workaround. Authors/dates cross-checked against opencores.org/projects/sparc64soc.

opencores/boundaries.locked_text: Clock-domain-boundary primitive library covering arbiter, basic FIFOs, clock detection, clock switching (2/3/4/8 sources), and debouncer for safe cross-domain glue.
opencores/boundaries.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. LLM rollup picked only the alphabetically-first sub-IP (arbiter) and missed that the repo is a CDC primitives library.

opencores/ecg.locked_text: Elliptic Curve Group operations over the F_3^m characteristic-3 extension field, companion to the Tate bilinear pairing core (Homer Hsing, 2011).
opencores/ecg.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. Despite the slug 'ecg', this is Elliptic Curve Group — pairing-friendly crypto, NOT electrocardiogram signal processing. LLM cross-contaminated description with the sibling 'pairing' repo's headers.

opencores/g729a_codec.locked_text: ITU-T G.729 Annex A voice codec implementing 8 kbit/s speech compression with 10 ms frames for low-bandwidth telephony applications.
opencores/g729a_codec.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. Auto-tier holdout after LLM rollup; rubric-locked.

opencores/gamepads.locked_text: Game-controller serial protocol cores covering NES, SNES, and Sega Genesis pad interfaces for retro-console replica designs.
opencores/gamepads.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. LLM picked up CVS $Id: header metadata; rubric-locked.

opencores/pairing.locked_text: Tate bilinear pairing computation over the F_3^m characteristic-3 extension field for pairing-based cryptography (Homer Hsing, 2011).
opencores/pairing.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. LLM lifted to author-attribution boilerplate; rubric-locked. Sibling to opencores/ecg.

opencores/t48.locked_text: Intel MCS-48 / 8048-family 8-bit microcontroller core in VHDL, implementing the original instruction set with on-chip ROM and RAM.
opencores/t48.notes: RTL-P3.360 ingest. LLM picked up README boilerplate with $Date: CVS metadata; rubric-locked.

opencores/avs_aes.locked_text: AES (Advanced Encryption Standard) 128-bit encryption/decryption block (AVS variant) — BSD-2-Clause Verilog primitive with synchronous load/ready handshake.
opencores/avs_aes.notes: RTL-P3.362 ingest. LLM lifted to repo-boilerplate ('This file is part of the project avs_aes'); rubric-locked.

opencores/sha3.locked_text: Keccak / SHA-3 cryptographic hash family — Apache-2.0 Verilog implementation with ack/in handshake interface.
opencores/sha3.notes: RTL-P3.362 ingest. LLM cross-described an internal port-handshake fragment instead of the IP; rubric-locked.

opencores/i2s_interface.locked_text: I²S audio bus interface controller with Wishbone control port — VHDL bridge between FPGA and external audio codecs.
opencores/i2s_interface.notes: RTL-P3.362 ingest. LLM picked formatting-noise from header banner; rubric-locked. First I²S in registry.

opencores/wb_lpc.locked_text: Wishbone-controlled LPC (Low Pin Count) bus interface — bridges Wishbone to LPC for x86-class designs needing legacy device buses (serial, KBD, BMC).
opencores/wb_lpc.notes: RTL-P3.362 ingest. LLM picked CVS $Id: line; rubric-locked.

opencores/yac.locked_text: Yet Another CORDIC — generic iterative CORDIC pipeline for trigonometric and hyperbolic functions with parameterised data width.
opencores/yac.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM picked file-header File: cordic_iterative_int.vhd metadata; rubric-locked.

opencores/sha_core.locked_text: SHA-1 (160-bit Secure Hash Algorithm) cryptographic hash core — single-block hashing primitive.
opencores/sha_core.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM picked banner-noise 'SHA-160 //// Secure Hash'; rubric-locked.

opencores/descore.locked_text: DES (Data Encryption Standard) cipher core — 56-bit key, 64-bit block. GPL-3+ VHDL. Sibling to deslcore/deslxcore/desxcore variants.
opencores/descore.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM lifted to GPL preamble fragment ('This program is free software'); rubric-locked.

opencores/deslcore.locked_text: DESL (DES-Lightweight) variant — area-optimised DES with a single shared S-box (Rolfes et al.). GPL-3+ VHDL. Sibling to descore/deslxcore/desxcore.
opencores/deslcore.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. Same GPL-preamble issue as descore.

opencores/deslxcore.locked_text: DESLX variant — combines the DES-Lightweight S-box optimisation with DES-X key whitening. GPL-3+ VHDL. Sibling to descore/deslcore/desxcore.
opencores/deslxcore.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. Same GPL-preamble issue as descore.

opencores/desxcore.locked_text: DES-X variant — adds XOR pre/post-whitening keys to standard DES (Rivest 1984), strengthening against brute-force. GPL-3+ VHDL.
opencores/desxcore.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. Same GPL-preamble issue as descore.

opencores/xteacore.locked_text: XTEA (eXtended Tiny Encryption Algorithm) cipher core — 128-bit key, 64-bit block, 64 Feistel rounds. GPL-3+ VHDL.
opencores/xteacore.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. Same GPL-preamble issue as descore.

opencores/reed_solomon_decoder.locked_text: Generic Reed-Solomon decoder pipeline with configurable code parameters. Sibling to opencores/rs_decoder_31_19_6 (specific to the (31,19,6) code).
opencores/reed_solomon_decoder.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. Same GPL-preamble issue as descore.

opencores/srl_fifo.locked_text: Xilinx SRL16/SRL32-based compact FIFO — uses SRL shift-register primitives for storage on Xilinx FPGA targets. VHDL utility primitive.
opencores/srl_fifo.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM lifted to repo-boilerplate ('part of the srl_fifo project'); rubric-locked.

opencores/wb_size_bridge.locked_text: Wishbone bus width-resize bridge — connects masters and slaves with mismatched data widths via byte-lane steering.
opencores/wb_size_bridge.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM picked OpenCores license preamble ('This source file may be used and distributed without'); rubric-locked.

opencores/wb_flash.locked_text: Wishbone-controlled parallel flash memory controller (CFI/JEDEC compatible). Verilog.
opencores/wb_flash.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM picked CVS $Id: line; rubric-locked.

opencores/video_stream_scaler.locked_text: Video stream scaler — line-buffer-based filtering pipeline that resamples raster video streams to a target output resolution. LGPL-2.1+ Verilog.
opencores/video_stream_scaler.notes: RTL-P3.363 ingest. LLM described an internal dual-port-RAM sub-module instead of the scaler IP; rubric-locked.

opencores/warp.locked_text: Image warping pipeline with image-decay / temporal-aging effect — geometric distortion + temporal modulation.
opencores/warp.notes: RTL-P3.362 ingest. LLM produced cryptic 'Image warping and decay, top-level'; rubric-locked.

opencores/fully-pipelined-edge-detection.locked_text: Fully-pipelined image edge-detection algorithms — Sobel and Canny family operators in mature Verilog form, ready for streaming raster pixel inputs.
opencores/fully-pipelined-edge-detection.notes: RTL-P3.364 ingest. LLM picked the Vivado tool-template header banner ('Company: Engineer: MUHAMMED KOCAOGLU Create Date:...'); rubric-locked.

opencores/apbtoaes128.locked_text: APB-to-AES-128 bridge — exposes an AES-128 cipher core through the AMBA APB peripheral bus for register-mapped key/data access.
opencores/apbtoaes128.notes: RTL-P3.364 ingest. LLM hallucinated 'APB to I2C project' attribution (the file's actual scope is APB-to-AES, not I2C); rubric-locked + factual fix.

opencores/sha256_hash_core.locked_text: SHA-256 cryptographic hash core — single-block 256-bit Secure Hash Algorithm 2 implementation with synchronous control interface.
opencores/sha256_hash_core.notes: RTL-P3.364 ingest. LLM picked Xilinx ISE/Vivado template header ('Create Date: ... Design Name: gv_sha256 Module Name...'); rubric-locked.

opencores/wbfmtx.locked_text: Wishbone-controlled FM transmitter — software-defined-radio building block that takes a Wishbone-attached audio stream and produces an FM-modulated baseband output.
opencores/wbfmtx.notes: RTL-P3.364 ingest. LLM picked author's narrative ('This Hack is based off of two things'); rubric-locked.

opencores/m32632.locked_text: National Semiconductor NS32000-series 32-bit CPU implementation in Verilog (Udo Möller). Maintained at RetroPM/m32632; LGPL-2.1.
opencores/m32632.notes: RTL-P3.364 ingest. Direct upstream (RetroPM/m32632, no fork-curate). LLM produced the literal GitHub one-line description ("Udo Möller's description") which echos the repo's own about-text; rubric-locked.

opencores/pci32tlite_oc.locked_text: PCI 32-bit Lite Target controller — minimal PCI target-mode interface in VHDL, useful for Wishbone-bus designs needing a PCI front-end.
opencores/pci32tlite_oc.notes: RTL-P4.33 ingest. LLM picked a banner-box of dashes/pipes as the description; rubric-locked.

opencores/sap_1_nanoprogrammed_processor.locked_text: SAP-1 (Simple-As-Possible) educational processor with nanoprogrammed control unit, following the Malvino reference design — pedagogical CPU implementation in Verilog.
opencores/sap_1_nanoprogrammed_processor.notes: RTL-P4.34 ingest. LLM picked Vivado tool-template header (Company:/Engineer:/Create Date:); rubric-locked.

asicguy/gplgpu.locked_text: 2D/3D graphics engine (GPU) — Drawing Engine 2D + 3D, texel pipeline, Display List Processor, Texture Cache, float ALU, Memory Controller, Digital RAMDAC, IBM-compatible VGA, host bus interface. Verilog/VHDL, GPL-3.0 with commercial dual-license available.
asicguy/gplgpu.notes: RTL-P3.284 ingest. Scanner picked the GPL preamble ("This program is free software...") from a header; rubric-locked the actual project description from curator notes.
